name: Mayor
description: Library component. The Mayor agent -- initiates convoys, observes completion, chooses normal-land or force-land. Two exit paths: NormalLanding (convoy reports AllDone) or ForceLanding (operator override via gt convoy land --force). Comparison to gastown-guide/mayor-coordination: that spec models the Mayor's structural role at the Go/session boundary; this component models the Mayor's role in the convoy-lands flow specifically.

LAUNCH.description: sends Launch to the convoy bead to initiate. Tagged 'Launch'.

LAND.description: sends Land or ForceLand to the convoy bead to land. Tagged 'Land' or 'ForceLand'.

CONVOY_DONE.description: receives ConvoyDone from the convoy bead when all work is complete. Tagged 'ConvoyDone'.

actors.name: Mayor
actors.owner: Mayor agent. Running -> LaunchingConvoy -> Observing -> {NormalLanding, ForceLanding} -> Done.

triples.event: convoy reports complete: mayor prepares normal land
mayor sends ForceLand to convoy (--force bypasses AllDone)
